nodes.label: Exploration
nodes.description: Adventures explore ancient strongholds and ruined kingdoms in the Sword Coast region

nodes.label: Guardian Encounters
nodes.description: Mysterious guardians guard the magical hot spring

nodes.label: Mushroom Connection
nodes.description: Magical connection to the Elemental Plane of Fire affects myconids

nodes.label: Cursed Hold
nodes.description: Horrible curse discovered in the ship's hold

nodes.label: Blue Dragon Lair
nodes.description: Exploration of the blue dragon's lair containing a captive bronze wyrmling

nodes.label: Monster Appears On Deck
nodes.description: A monster hauls itself up onto the deck as lightning flashes.

nodes.label: Merrow Escape
nodes.description: The merrow escapes into the depths

nodes.label: Sailor Cheer
nodes.description: Sailors celebrate after the merrow departs

nodes.label: Learning About Dangers
nodes.description: Characters learn about the dangers facing Stormwreck Isle.

nodes.label: Encounter_with_Drowned_Sailors
nodes.description: Undead sailors emerge from the water and approach the party

nodes.label: Dialogue
nodes.description: A kobold initiates conversation by asking the travelers' name

nodes.label: Guardian Encounter
nodes.description: Tarak is repelled by the fungal octopus guardian protecting the myconid caves.

nodes.label: Tattoo Symbol Discovery
nodes.description: Detecting the Gilded Gallows symbol on Tarak's tattoo requires a successful History check.

nodes.label: Statue Identification
nodes.description: Character identifies the statue as depicting a bronze dragon using Arcana skill check

nodes.label: Runara's Revelation
nodes.description: Runara reveals the statue depicts Astalagan, her late father

nodes.label: Observation
nodes.description: Description of monastic cells layout and occupancy

nodes.label: Winch Operation
nodes.description: Mechanism allows lowering/pulling pallet via winch

nodes.label: Observation
nodes.description: Residents favor Tarak's cooking

nodes.label: Dialogue About Myconid Mission
nodes.description: Tarak informs the party about seeking help from the myconids and retrieving heart cap mushrooms.

nodes.label: Guardian Encounter
nodes.description: The party battles the fungal octopus guarding the sea caves.

nodes.label: Myconid Investigation
nodes.description: The party explores the sea caves to determine the cause of the myconids' distress.

nodes.label: Dream_Interpretation_Dialogue
nodes.description: Runara interprets the cleric's dream about the hunger of death and directs them to investigate the wreck of Compass Rose

nodes.label: Paladin's Arrival and Guidance
nodes.description: Runara advises the paladin to consult Tarak and Varnoth, and recommends spending time in the temple of Bahamut.

nodes.label: Final Reflection Prompt
nodes.description: Runara questions the paladin about lessons learned against corruption, suggesting personal quests to combat evil.

nodes.label: Revelation
nodes.description: Runara reveals her true draconic form through magical transformation

nodes.label: Dialogue
nodes.description: Runara explains the resurgence of conflict on the island and requests assistance

nodes.label: Discovery of Hot Springs
nodes.description: Adventurers uncover a hidden cove with a glowing hot spring surrounded by colorful fungi.

nodes.label: Discovery of Hot Spring Regeneration
nodes.description: Characters can regain hit points by bathing in the hot spring after spending 10 minutes.

nodes.label: Kobold Encounter
nodes.description: Eight kobolds and three winged kobolds appear as per the 3rd-level encounter guidelines.

nodes.label: Travel Options Revealed
nodes.description: Characters learn of two ways to reach Seagrow Caves: rowboat journey or coastal trek

nodes.label: Tide Access Restriction
nodes.description: Characters must navigate tides to access lower caverns

nodes.label: Telepathic Link Activation
nodes.description: Characters gain telepathic communication with myconids via rapport spores

nodes.label: Myconid Movement Triggered by Distress Spores
nodes.description: Myconids in areas B2 and B3 relocate to area B4 after detecting distress spores released by damaged myconids.

nodes.label: Confrontation
nodes.description: Conscious myconids attack intruders lacking escort

nodes.label: Shared Trance
nodes.description: Four myconids enter a dream-like meld state

nodes.label: Illness Effect
nodes.description: Myconids show signs of blight-induced fatigue

nodes.label: Defensive Encounter
nodes.description: Myconid Adults defend their unconscious leader against unauthorized intruders

nodes.label: Elixir Creation
nodes.description: Characters bring ruby morel to cloister, enabling Tarak to craft an elixir of health

nodes.label: Fume Drake Encounter
nodes.description: Two fume drakes ambush intruding creatures in the sulfer-laden cave

nodes.label: Blight Source Revelation
nodes.description: Characters uncover the link between the tomb's magical energies and the toxic fungal spread

nodes.label: Level Advancement
nodes.description: Characters gain a level upon completing the chapter, advancing based on prior explorations of key locations

nodes.label: Harpy Lair Discovery
nodes.description: Characters discover the harpy's nest in the crow's nest, filled with debris and remnants of its lair.

nodes.label: Treasure Discovery
nodes.description: Characters discover valuable loot in the crow's nest

nodes.label: Movement_Illusion
nodes.description: Crabs create illusions of movement over skeletal remains

nodes.label: Suspicious Movement
nodes.description: The skeletal remains appear to shift slightly, suggesting unnatural activity.

nodes.label: Structural Collapse
nodes.description: A fallen chest created holes connecting the captain's quarters to the lower deck hold

nodes.label: Travel Options
nodes.description: Multiple routes described to reach the Clifftop Observatory

nodes.label: Approach_by_Water
nodes.description: Characters approach the observatory by sea, choosing between rowing directly or anchoring near pillars to access elevated areas.

nodes.label: Screeching Roar Encounter
nodes.description: A winged, glittering blue shape roars and perches atop a distant column.

nodes.label: Stirge Attack
nodes.description: A stirge attack disrupts the kobolds' preparations for Sparkrender's ritual.

nodes.label: Effigy Explanation
nodes.description: Mek and Minn explain the purpose of the dragon effigies to the adventurers.

nodes.label: Creative Access to D4
nodes.description: Characters devise unconventional methods to reach the isolated study

nodes.label: Dragon Awakened
nodes.description: Sparkrender awakens and growslows threats in Draconic

nodes.label: Breathing Attack
nodes.description: Blue Dragon Wyrmling uses Breath Weapon ability

nodes.label: Flight Attempt
nodes.description: Sparkrender flees after dropping to 10 hp

nodes.label: Discovery
nodes.description: Growling heard from area D6

nodes.label: Statue Alignment Puzzle
nodes.description: Players align statues with the Dragon of Dawn constellation to activate the hidden staircase to the secret archive.

nodes.label: Staircase Activation
nodes.description: Once statues are properly aligned, a glowing spiral staircase appears connecting to the library below.

nodes.label: Seal Mechanism
nodes.description: Disrupting the statue alignment causes the staircase to rise, trapping anyone on it above.

nodes.label: Discovery
nodes.description: Characters find Sparkrender's hoard containing coins and valuable items

nodes.label: Unexpected Encounter
nodes.description: A large bronze dragon crashes through debris and begins to stir

nodes.label: Discovery of Magical Artifacts
nodes.description: Characters uncover a +1 battleaxe and a 2nd-level hold person spell scroll after succeeding on an Intelligence (Investigation) check

nodes.label: Freeing Aidron
nodes.description: Adventurers remove chains binding Aidron using clasps.
